ai_summary: AI-powered Node.js CLI that tracks meaningful project evolution, generates structured AI-readable context, serves project context locally through Express, can publish public AI-readable context through optional GitHub sync.
key_features: CLI commands for initializing, linking, starting, and updating AI context
Noise-filtered watcher that turns file changes into meaningful project updates
Local Express server for AI-readable context endpoints
Optional GitHub sync for publishing public AI-readable context
Intelligent state engine that summarizes project evolution for AI tools
known_issues: No automated test suite is detected yet.
next_steps: Add automated tests for the state engine, watcher, and GitHub sync flows.
